name: Cancellation due to date confusion
description: Patient wants to cancel an appointment they mistakenly believe is tomorrow but is actually next week.
goal: Cancel what they think is tomorrow's appointment, accept when clarified it's next week.
behavior: Express urgency in needing to cancel
Once corrected, acknowledge the actual date and decide to keep the appointment
success_criteria: Agent should confirm the actual date of the appointment
Agent must explain the appointment is next week, not tomorrow
Agent should ensure the patient decides whether to keep or reschedule the correct appointment date
orchestrator_hint: Patient requests to cancel an appointment they mistakenly believe is tomorrow, but it's actually next week.
